limits: A positive decision only means a separate governed integration plan may be proposed.
Does not modify context selection or ContextPackManifest.items.
Does not change provider prompts or prompt rendering.
Does not persist graph nodes or graph edges.
Does not introduce a graph database.
Does not call retrieval services, embedding services, rerankers, or production indexes.
Does not mutate indexes, memory stores, runtime manifests, or repository graph state.
Does not perform automatic context inclusion.
Does not admit or implement context-pack integration.
name: Graph neighborhood repository readiness decision artifact
recommended_next_actions: Use CAP-0008 to decide whether to propose a separate context-pack integration plan.
Do not treat CAP-0008 output as runtime selection authority.
risks: A positive readiness decision may be mistaken for integration approval unless the separate-plan boundary remains explicit.
Future context-pack integration, graph persistence, retrieval, embeddings, reranking, prompt changes, or runtime selection require separate governed plans and warrants.
summary: Records an evidence-only repository readiness decision artifact for graph-local scoped memory. The artifact recommends proposing a separate governed context-pack integration plan while preserving selection_effect none and blocking runtime/context-pack/provider/persistence/retrieval changes.
